title: Sweet and Smoky Apricot BBQ Sauce
description: A sweet and smoky BBQ sauce featuring dried apricots. Perfect for slathering on ribs, chicken, or pork.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine the chopped apricots, cherries, onion, and paprika.
Heat the apple cider vinegar in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the blended mixture to the saucepan.
Whisk constantly and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the sauce through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any solids.
Return the sauce to the saucepan and let simmer for an additional 5-10 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Let cool to room temperature before transferring to an airtight container.
Store in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
